description: Post an insurance payment (EOB) for patient Oliver Queen (DOB: 1985-05-15) in NOSH ChartingSystem using admin credentials (password: Admin1234!). Locate the outstanding balance from the 2025-03-01 visit and post an insurance payment from Star City Health (Check/Ref Number: 556677) in the amount of $180.00 dated today. Apply the payment to the specific encounter/charge to reduce the balance and save the transaction.
